benefits.name: Complete Property Tax Exemption (100% Disabled)
benefits.description: Veterans with 100% VA disability rating receive full exemption from property taxes on their homestead.
benefits.notes: Full homestead exemption for 100% service-connected disabled veterans.

benefits.name: Partial Property Tax Exemption (Disabled Veterans)
benefits.description: Veterans with service-connected disability receive up to $1,500 per year property tax exemption. Requires Honorable or General discharge.
benefits.notes: Up to $1,500/year exemption for disabled veterans. Requires Honorable or General discharge.

benefits.name: Oklahoma Veterans Registry Bonus
benefits.description: Cash bonus payments for Oklahoma resident veterans who served in eligible conflicts (Vietnam, Iraq, Afghanistan, etc.).
benefits.notes: Cash bonus for Oklahoma resident veterans who served in eligible conflicts. Amount and eligibility vary by conflict and service dates.

benefits.name: Free Vehicle Registration (100% Disabled or Former POW)
benefits.description: Veterans with 100% disability rating or former prisoners of war receive free vehicle registration.
benefits.notes: Free registration for 100% disabled or POW status. Applies to one vehicle registered in Oklahoma.

benefits.name: State Income Tax Exemption (Military Retirement)
benefits.description: Military retirement pay is fully exempt from Oklahoma state income tax.
benefits.notes: Full exemption from state income tax on military retirement pay. No residency requirement for this benefit.

benefits.name: Free Hunting and Fishing License
benefits.description: Veterans with 50% or higher service-connected disability, or age 60+ with any disability rating, receive a free lifetime hunting and fishing combo license.
benefits.notes: Lifetime combo license for 50%+ disabled or veterans age 60+ with any disability. Free issuance and renewal.

benefits.name: State Employment Preference
benefits.description: Oklahoma gives preference points to veterans in state civil service hiring.
benefits.notes: Veterans receive preference points or priority consideration in Oklahoma state employment hiring.

benefits.name: Oklahoma Veterans Centers
benefits.description: State-operated veteran centers providing benefits counseling, employment assistance, and veteran resources.
benefits.notes: Multiple centers statewide providing benefits navigation, employment services, and veteran support programs.

benefits.name: Property Tax Exemption (Wartime Veterans)
benefits.description: Additional property tax exemption available for Oklahoma veterans who served during designated wartime periods.
benefits.notes: Additional exemption for wartime service. Qualifies for various wartime conflict periods.
